title.zh: 春天养生：养肝护肝的5个秘诀
title.en: Spring Wellness: 5 Tips for Liver Health

zh.text: 中医认为，春季与肝相对应，是养肝护肝的重要时节。春天阳气升发，正是调理身体的好时机。
春季应该早起早睡，顺应自然界阳气升发的规律。建议晚上10点前入睡，早上6-7点起床。
春季适合进行适度的户外运动，如散步、太极拳、瑜伽等。运动有助于肝气疏泄，促进血液循环。
3. 饮食清淡，少食酸多吃甘
春季饮食应清淡，多吃新鲜蔬菜和水果。建议多吃甘味食物（如红枣、山药），少食酸味食物。
肝主疏泄，情绪不畅容易导致肝气郁结。保持积极乐观的心态，对养肝非常重要。

items: 太冲穴：足背第一、二跖骨之间
期门穴：乳头直下，第6肋间隙
行间穴：足背第一、二趾间

zh.text: 温馨提示：以上建议仅供参考，具体体质调理请咨询专业中医师。

en.text: In TCM, spring corresponds to the liver and is an important time for liver health. As yang qi rises in spring, it is the perfect season for body conditioning.
In spring, go to bed early and wake early to align with nature's rising yang qi. Aim to sleep before 10 PM and wake at 6-7 AM.
Spring is suitable for moderate outdoor exercise such as walking, Tai Chi, or yoga. Exercise helps liver qi circulation and promotes blood flow.
3. Light Diet: Less Sour, More Sweet
Spring diet should be light, with plenty of fresh vegetables and fruits. Eat more sweet-flavored foods (dates, yams) and less sour foods.
The liver governs the free flow of qi. Emotional stagnation can easily lead to liver qi stagnation. Maintaining a positive attitude is important for liver health.

items: Taichong (LR3): On dorsum of foot, between 1st and 2nd metatarsal bones
Qimen (LR14): On nipple line, in 6th intercostal space
Xingjian (LR2): On dorsum of foot, between 1st and 2nd toes

en.text: Disclaimer: These suggestions are for reference only. Please consult a TCM practitioner for personalized advice.
